tzubaki.tags: 1boy, solo, tzubaki \(character\), black hair, messy hair, red eyes
tzubaki.personality: Minimalist, analytical, debt-obsessed. Never uses more energy than needed.

clothing.combat: black robe, sleeves rolled, bandaged arms

tzubaki.visual_marks: Black ink-blot birthmark that moves across skin

the_hermit.tags: 1boy, old man, long white beard, bald, golden eyes, wise

clothing.default: tattered robes, wooden sandals, straw hat

headmistress.tags: 1girl, mature female, tall, sharp eyes, silver hair, bun hair, glasses
headmistress.personality: Calculating, sees Tzubaki as a tool

clothing.default: formal academy robes, gold trim, high collar

roommate.tags: 1boy, young, tired eyes, pale skin, short brown hair, empty expression
roommate.personality: Husk — mark was stolen, barely functional
